name: Extensive Service Data
description: Comprehensive service listings across all categories

Services.title: Emergency Plumbing Repair - 24/7 Service
Services.description:
Fast and reliable emergency plumbing services available 24/7. I handle leaks, clogged drains, burst pipes, and all urgent plumbing issues. Equipped with modern tools and replacement parts for quick fixes. Serving all areas of Addis Ababa with prompt response times.

✅ 24/7 Emergency Service
✅ Licensed and Insured
✅ Same-Day Service
✅ Free Estimates
✅ Quality Guarantee

Common issues I fix:
• Leaking pipes and faucets
• Clogged drains and toilets
• Water heater problems
• Low water pressure
• Burst pipe emergencies
• Sewer line issues
requirements: Provide access to the problem area
Let me know if water needs to be shut off

Services.title: Complete Bathroom Installation & Renovation
Services.description:
Professional bathroom installation and renovation services. From basic bathroom setups to luxury spa-like renovations. I handle everything from plumbing and tiling to fixture installation and final touches.

Services Include:
• Complete bathroom plumbing
• Shower and tub installation
• Toilet and sink setup
• Tile work and flooring
• Vanity and cabinet installation
• Lighting and ventilation
• Waterproofing and sealing

Why choose me?
✅ 12+ Years Experience
✅ Quality Materials
✅ On-Time Completion
✅ Clean Work Area
✅ Satisfaction Guaranteed
requirements: Choose fixtures and materials in advance
Provide access to water and electricity

Services.title: Home Electrical Wiring & Safety Inspection
Services.description:
Complete electrical wiring services for homes, apartments, and offices. Certified electrician with focus on safety and code compliance. I handle everything from new construction wiring to electrical upgrades and safety inspections.

Services Offered:
• Complete home electrical wiring
• Circuit breaker panel upgrades
• Outlet and switch installation
• Lighting fixture installation
• Electrical safety inspections
• Code compliance certification
• Emergency electrical repairs

Safety Features:
✅ Ground Fault Circuit Interrupters
✅ Arc Fault Circuit Interrupters
✅ Surge Protection
✅ Proper Grounding
✅ Code Compliance
requirements: Provide building electrical plan if available
Ensure power can be shut off during work

Services.title: Smart Home Automation Setup
Services.description:
Transform your home with cutting-edge smart technology. Complete smart home automation setup including smart lighting, security systems, climate control, and voice assistant integration.

Smart Home Features:
• Smart Lighting Control
• Security Camera Installation
• Smart Lock Setup
• Thermostat Automation
• Voice Control (Google Assistant/Alexa)
• Smart Blinds and Curtains
• Whole-Home Audio System
• Energy Monitoring

Popular Systems I Work With:
✅ Philips Hue Lighting
✅ Nest Thermostat
✅ Ring Security
✅ August Smart Lock
✅ Sonos Audio
✅ Samsung SmartThings
requirements: Provide home layout for optimal placement

Services.title: Custom Furniture Design & Construction
Services.description:
Handcrafted custom furniture made to your exact specifications. Using quality hardwoods and traditional joinery techniques to create pieces that last generations.

Furniture Types:
• Dining Tables and Chairs
• Bedroom Sets (Beds, Dressers, Nightstands)
• Living Room Furniture
• Office Desks and Bookcases
• Custom Cabinetry
• Outdoor Furniture
• Specialty Pieces

Wood Options Available:
✅ Ethiopian Oak
✅ African Mahogany
✅ Teak
✅ Mango Wood
✅ Pine (for painted pieces)

Process:
1. Design Consultation
2. Material Selection
3. Construction
4. Finishing
5. Delivery & Setup
requirements: Provide design ideas or inspiration photos

Services.title: Python Programming Bootcamp - Beginner to Advanced
Services.description:
Comprehensive Python programming course designed for absolute beginners to advanced developers. Learn Python through practical projects and real-world applications.

Course Curriculum:
• Python Basics and Syntax
• Data Structures and Algorithms
• Object-Oriented Programming
• Web Development with Django/Flask
• Data Analysis with Pandas
• Automation and Scripting
• Building Real Projects

What You'll Learn:
✅ Write clean, efficient Python code
✅ Build web applications
✅ Analyze and visualize data
✅ Automate repetitive tasks
✅ Prepare for Python jobs

Teaching Approach:
• Personalized lessons
• Hands-on coding exercises
• Project-based learning
• Code reviews and feedback
• Career guidance
